# Pull Request

## Type of Change
- [ ] `fix:` Bug fix (non-breaking change)
- [ ] `docs:` Documentation update
- [ ] `style:` Formatting, no functional change
- [ ] `refactor:` Code restructuring, no behavior change
- [ ] `feat:` New verified content or feature

## Description
[Technical summary of changes. Neutral tone, no marketing language.]

## Verification
- [ ] Changes follow Content Policy (verified facts only)
- [ ] Primary source links included for new claims
- [ ] Status labels applied: `confirmed` | `in-development` | `experimental` | `speculative`
- [ ] No marketing language, hype, or subjective evaluations

## Testing
- [ ] Local build passes: `npm run build`
- [ ] No console errors in development mode
- [ ] Responsive layout verified (mobile + desktop)

## Related Issues
Closes #[issue_number] (if applicable)
